_README: FITB@4 construction freeze (build doc §4/§12). FROZEN at C2 (2026-06-29), before any model number. This encodes the RULES + seed, NOT materialized questions — the questions are regenerated deterministically from the seed by data_loader.build_fitb at C3/C4. Gate D = the full held-out test FITB set; gate B = a seed-ordered candidate prefix the judge also scores (prefix length N chosen at C4, never the SET re-chosen). chance@4 = 0.25.

eligibility.rule: a type-filtered test outfit (>= 2 clothing items, strict_disjoint=True) is eligible iff its seed-chosen held-out item's category_id pool can supply 3 distractors under the distractor rule
eligibility.ineligible_handling: skipped + counted (the §4/§15 scarcity disclosure); not silently dropped
eligibility.scarcity_choice: the FROZEN C2 Polyvore headline choice is SKIP-AND-COUNT (data_loader.build_fitb). No coarse-5-type FITB-distractor broadening enters gates B or D, so every reported FITB question is cleanly @4-chance 0.25.

held_out_item_rule.rule: rng.choice(outfit.item_ids) with the committed seed (matches build_fitb)
held_out_item_rule.retained: all other clothing items of the outfit

distractor_rule.same_category: same category_id (the Vasileva 153-category fine grain) as the held-out answer
distractor_rule.multi_anchor_non_cooccurrence: each distractor must NEVER co-occur (anywhere in the split) with ANY item remaining in the partial outfit — the §4 multi-anchor generalization, not merely one designated anchor
distractor_rule.split_scoped: drawn only from the test split pool (no cross-split leak)
distractor_rule.tie_policy: a k-way top tie scores 1/k (deterministic, seed-independent at scoring time)

candidate_order: answer + 3 distractors, then seeded shuffle (build_fitb); correct_index recorded

allocation._note: gate B is a SUBSET of gate D's full set — same questions, like-for-like (build doc §12).

gate_D.name: fitb_trained_full
gate_D.set: every eligible held-out test FITB question, one per distinct test outfit
gate_D.purpose: maximal-N absolute floor, anchored against Vasileva's 51.8% disjoint FITB with exclusions/protocol differences disclosed

gate_B.name: fitb_trained_gateB / fitb_judge_gateB
gate_B.set: the first up to 500 questions from the deterministic seed-ordered construction frozen here (constructor + source hashes + seed 20260629); C3 materializes and hashes the ordered question list before any model number
gate_B.C4_freedom: ONLY the prefix length N (a deterministic prefix of the C2-frozen order) chosen to reach paired-diff half_width <= delta (0.05); the ~100-Q pilot is the first prefix; the SET/order is never re-selected
gate_B.underpowered: if N caps at 500 and half_width > 0.05, gate B = underpowered -> no-go (never widen delta)
gate_B.effective_N: one question per distinct outfit so effective-N = N

distinct_names_invariant: metrics.json names the trained reads distinctly (fitb_trained_full / fitb_trained_gateB) and the judge read as fitb_judge_gateB; no gate reads an ambiguous 'FITB_trained' (build doc §12)
